Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue (Closes #123). -->

## How verified

<!-- Which checks/tests did you run? -->

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (format + lint + type-check)
- [ ] Relevant tests pass (`pnpm test` / `pnpm --filter … test` / `pnpm test:e2e`)
- [ ] Added/updated a worklog in `docs/worklog/` for non-trivial changes
- [ ] Schema change? Regenerated the migration (`pnpm --filter @wrightful/dashboard db:generate`)
- [ ] User-facing reporter change? Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
